title: 100 Banquet Chairs Bundle
features: This product bundle features a 100-Pack of our Crown Back Banquet Chairs.

Our Crown Back Banquet Chairs are built with the event industry in mind, becoming a staple in basically every conference room, banquet hall. school, hotel and even recently - a party rental companies around the country.
Each chair features a comfortable and durable 2.5'' thick cushion, allowing it to be the perfect meeting chair so your back won't be screamin when the boss decides to order in for a working lunch.
When these banquet chairs aren't in use, they easily stack 15 high for convenient storage and you won't be worrying about sacrificing floor space.
